description: Starter automation kit. Replace this config (or run the generator) to target a specific field.
systemPrompt: You are a meticulous operations agent. You complete multi-step office tasks end to end using the available tools: read source files, produce deliverables, keep simple records, and create follow-up tasks. Prefer doing the work over describing it. When a task is ambiguous, make a reasonable assumption and note it. Always write outputs to the ./output directory and confirm what you produced.

bestPractices.title: Point Cowork at one scoped folder
bestPractices.detail: Grant access to a single working folder (e.g. ./inbox and ./output) rather than your whole drive, so the agent has a clear, safe surface to operate on.

bestPractices.title: Keep deterministic work in tools
bestPractices.detail: File I/O, records, and task creation are tools (predictable). Judgement and synthesis stay in the prompt. This makes runs reproducible and cheaper.

bestPractices.title: Schedule the recurring parts
bestPractices.detail: Anything you'd do every morning (digest, triage, reminders) should be a scheduled workflow, not a manual prompt.

tools.name: read_document
tools.description: Read the full text contents of a file in the workspace. Use before summarizing, extracting, or transforming any document.

path.description: Path to the file, relative to the workspace root.

tools.name: list_workspace
tools.description: List files in the workspace, optionally filtered by a glob pattern (e.g. 'inbox/*.txt'). Use to discover what inputs are available.

pattern.description: Optional glob, relative to workspace root. Defaults to everything under ./inbox.

tools.name: write_deliverable
tools.description: Write a finished deliverable to the ./output directory. Use for reports, drafts, summaries, and any file the user should receive.

tools.name: save_record
tools.description: Append a structured record to a simple local datastore (a JSONL file per table). Use as a lightweight CRM/log: leads, contacts, transactions, etc.

data.description: The record to store as key/value pairs.

tools.name: lookup_record
tools.description: Search the local datastore for records in a table whose fields contain the given query string. Use to recall previously saved records.

query.description: Case-insensitive substring to match against any field. Empty returns all.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a follow-up task with an optional due date. Use whenever the work surfaces something a human needs to do later.

due.description: Optional ISO date or natural phrase ('next Monday').

workflows.name: process-inbox
workflows.description: Read everything in ./inbox, produce a consolidated summary deliverable, and create follow-up tasks for anything that needs action.
workflows.prompt: List the files in ./inbox. Read each one. Produce a single 'inbox-summary.md' deliverable that summarizes every document with key points, and for each item that needs action, create a task. End by telling me what you wrote and which tasks you created.

workflows.name: daily-digest
workflows.description: A morning digest of new inbox items with follow-ups.
workflows.prompt: Create a dated daily digest from today's ./inbox files: one short paragraph per document plus a combined action list. Save it as 'digest-<today>.md' in ./output and create tasks for the action items.
